scriptDesc: Install Google Chrome browser via Chocolatey, with official standalone installer fallback

messages.checking: Checking for existing Google Chrome install...
messages.notFound: Google Chrome not found -- will install via Chocolatey
messages.verifyFailed: Install completed but chrome.exe was not found in any expected location -- choco package may have changed install path
messages.fallbackTriggered: Chocolatey path failed -- falling back to official Chrome standalone installer ({reason})
messages.fallbackDisabled: Fallback disabled in config -- aborting after Chocolatey failure
messages.fallbackInstallerExited: Official installer exited with code {code} after {seconds}s
messages.fallbackVerifyFailed: Official installer ran but chrome.exe still not found in expected locations
messages.fallbackSuccess: Google Chrome installed via official installer at: {path}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.cleanupSkipped: Post-uninstall cleanup disabled in config -- skipping registry + shortcut sweep
messages.cleanupStart: Sweeping leftover Chrome registry keys + shortcuts...
messages.cleanupSummary: Cleanup summary -- registry: {regRemoved} removed / {regMissing} clean / {regFailed} failed; shortcuts: {scRemoved} removed / {scMissing} clean / {scFailed} failed
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.with-ext: Install Chrome AND all configured extensions in one shot
commands.ext: Show the extension catalog (no args) or install specific ones: ext vpn,tabcopy
commands.ext <name>: Install one or more extensions by name (vpn, tabcopy, tabextend, adblocker)

parameters.-Method: Extension install method: auto (default) | registry (silent, needs admin) | webstore (open Web Store pages)
parameters.-WithExt: When installing Chrome, also install all extensions afterwards

examples: .\run.ps1 install chrome with-ext              # Chrome + all 4 extensions
.\run.ps1 install chrome ext vpn,adblocker     # install two extensions
.\run.ps1 install chrome ext-all -Method registry   # silent (admin) force-install
